title: Hyderabad、Telangana — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]

概述

Hyderabad是Telangana的一个城市，人口约9,480,000。A historic city known for its pearl and diamond trading, now a major IT and pharmaceutical hub with iconic Charminar monument.
